use std::fs::File;
use std::os::unix::io::{FromRawFd, OwnedFd};

fn pass_to_child(file: File) {
    let owned: OwnedFd = file.into();
    let fd = owned.as_raw_fd();
    unsafe {
        libc::dup2(fd, libc::STDIN_FILENO);
    }
    drop(owned);
}

fn take_fd_ownership(file: File) -> OwnedFd {
    file.into()
}
